note: Reviewed baseline (RD-0348 .mjs scanner-coverage fix). This package's source is .mjs, which the scanner's default extensions ([.ts,.fungi]) did not match — so the prior baseline was auto-generated over ZERO scanned files (an empty allowlist that passed vacuously). A packageGraph.extensions override in package.json now scans the .mjs, and this allowlist is the reviewed surface: node builtins only (child_process spawns the compared runtimes; fs/os/path/url/perf_hooks do I/O, platform detection, and timing) — no third-party, no @galerina reach-through. `--check` fails if a new external import appears.
